# POSCO 005490 Green Steel Premium Thesis

URL: https://barneywohl.github.io/korea-research-map-agents/agentpress/examples/posco-green-steel/
Type: Agent-native publication

## Summary

Agent-native diligence wrapper for the POSCO green steel premium thesis. Research commentary only; not investment advice.

## Primary task

Verify whether POSCO HyREX milestones, green steel offtake, and carbon policy evidence support or kill the green steel premium thesis.
